creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #28)

Apologies, forgot to explicit mention that the problematic aspect is with the use of 'concurrent'. The only package version that should install a 'suffix-less'  filename is the 'default (python) version'. 

I'm not sure how the semantics of this change with 'allflavors' usage, which also begs the question, what are we using allflavors for?
